title: Tankers Research Update
summary:
Main
Four oil terminals under Qingdao port implement new tanker scoring system, effects marginal
Effective November 1, Qingdao Port - one of the largest crude import hubs in Shandong - will introduce a new "tanker scoring system" across its four oil terminals - Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal Co, Qingdao Shihua Crude Oil Terminal Co, Qingdao Gangxin Oil Products Co and Qingdao Lixing Logistics Co. The framework establishes hard prohibitions and a points-based penalty structure aimed at tightening safety and compliance standards. Immediate bans will apply to vessels that fall under the following categories: Missing essential documentation (e.g.
